hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | grep -E '(resume\.html|style\.css)' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && /Applications/Google\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\ Chrome --headless --print-to-pdf=/Users/nobuyoshishimmen/dev/resume/Resume.pdf --no-sandbox 'file:///Users/nobuyoshishimmen/dev/resume/resume.html' 2>/dev/null || true; }
